meaning: n.凹,凹痕,(齿轮的)齿,弱点v.使凹下,凹进,削弱
examples: There was a dent in the nearside wing.
They can beat out the dent in the car's wing.
These can dent and scratch your floor.
Clinton's opponents were quick to predict that the flap over the archives would dent her claim to electability.
What this all boils down to: a dent to profits and earnings per share.
